**Why this fits**

<!--
How does this relate to the project's existing commitments? See CONTRIBUTING.md:
- mechanical SP-I in code (not LLM-introspected)
- read/write firewall (Observe is read-only)
- append-only episodic + git rollback
- operator-as-environment (not user, not developer)

If your change rubs against any of these, name it explicitly — that's not a
blocker, it's where the conversation should start.
-->

**What it isn't**

Boundaries help. Examples:
- "Not letting the chat tab inject stimuli (the firewall is intentional)"
- "Not removing the manual operator-press-Play step after boredom"
- "Not adding persistent Telegram chat history"
-->
